name: Granny's Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Open the can of pork and beans.
2. Pour out about one-third of the contents into another container.
3. Add the chile sauce to the remaining beans in the can.
4. Stir in the pickle relish, molasses, mustard, and vinegar until well combined.
5. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
6. Serve and enjoy your Granny's Beans!
